post.summary: Generate an access token and refresh token for a user.
post.description: Authenticates the user with the provided credentials and returns a token pair that can be used to access protected endpoints and renew the session.

post.summary: Refresh an authenticated session by issuing a new token pair.
post.description: Validates the submitted refresh token together with the expired access token context and returns a new access token and refresh token pair.

get.summary: Retrieve the currently authenticated user's account details.
get.description: Returns the application user profile associated with the access token that was used to call the endpoint.

post.summary: Send an email confirmation link to a user account.
post.description: Generates an email confirmation token for the specified user account and sends a confirmation message that contains the verification link.
Validates the confirmation token received from the email message and marks the user's email address as confirmed when the token is valid.

post.summary: Send a password reset link to a user account.
post.description: Generates a password reset token for the specified user account and sends an email containing the reset link.

post.summary: Reset a user's password using a reset token.
post.description: Validates the provided reset token and updates the user's password when the token is valid.
Verifies the existing password and updates it to the new password for the specified user account.

get.description: Returns the profile image file associated with the specified student. If no image is available, the request returns the appropriate error response instead of student details.
Returns the cover image file associated with the specified book so clients can display the book artwork in listings and detail views.

get.summary: Retrieve the current authenticated student's profile.
get.description: Returns the student record that is linked to the currently authenticated user, including the details needed for the student's account experience.

post.summary: Create a new student account and student profile.
post.description: Registers a new student, stores the submitted profile information, and creates the linked user account required for authentication and future access to the platform.

get.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of students.
get.description: Returns a paginated collection of students and supports filtering, free-text searching, and sorting by [joindate,state,name,updatedat,createdat] asc / descso administrators can review student records efficiently.

patch.summary: Update an existing student's profile information.
patch.description: Updates the editable profile information for the specified student, including the uploaded personal photo when a new file is provided in the request.

get.description: Returns the full student details for the specified student identifier when the student record exists.

patch.description: Approves the specified student after the required validation checks pass so the student can move forward in the account lifecycle.
Marks the specified student as active after approval so the student can use the platform according to the assigned permissions.
Blocks the specified student from using the platform by moving the account into a banned state until further administrative action is taken.
Rejects the specified student account while it is under review so it does not proceed to activation or normal platform use.

patch.summary: Remove the ban from a student account.
patch.description: Restores access for the specified student by removing the banned state so the account can continue through the expected lifecycle.

patch.summary: Move a student account back to the pending state.
patch.description: Returns the specified student account to the pending review state, which is useful when an earlier rejection needs to be reconsidered.

get.summary: Retrieve a lending list record by identifier.
get.description: Returns the detailed lending list record for the specified identifier when the record exists.

get.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of lending list records.
get.description: Returns a paginated collection of lending list records and supports searching, filtering, and sorting by [createdat,updatedat,cost,borrowingduration,expirationdate,state] so users can review lending activity efficiently.

post.summary: Create a borrowing request for a lending list record.
post.description: Creates a borrowing request for the specified lending list record so the borrowing workflow can proceed when the record is available.

get.summary: Retrieve a borrowing request by identifier.
get.description: Returns the borrowing request details for the specified identifier when the request exists.

get.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of borrowing requests.
get.description: Returns a paginated collection of borrowing requests and supports searching, filtering, and sorting by [createdat,updatedat,expirationdate,state,borrowername,booktitle] so clients can review borrowing activity efficiently.

patch.description: Marks the specified borrowing request as accepted when it is in a valid pending state.
Rejects the specified borrowing request when it is in a valid pending state.
Cancels the specified borrowing request when it is in a valid state for cancellation.

post.description: Creates a new book in the catalog using the submitted metadata and cover image so it can be referenced by book copy and listing endpoints.

get.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of books.
get.description: Returns a paginated collection of books and supports searching, category filtering, status filtering, and sorting by [createdat,updatedat,title,publisher,author] so clients can browse the catalog efficiently.

patch.description: Updates the editable information for the specified book so catalog data remains accurate and current across the application.

delete.description: Deletes the specified book from the catalog when it is not referenced by any book copies.

get.description: Returns the detailed catalog information for the specified book when a matching record exists.

patch.description: Marks the specified book as available when it is in a valid state for availability.
Rejects the specified book when it is in a valid state for rejection.

post.summary: Create a new book copy record.
post.description: Creates a new book copy for the specified student and links it to an existing book so the physical copy can be tracked by the system.

patch.summary: Update an existing book copy record.
patch.description: Updates the editable information for the specified book copy, such as its condition, so copy tracking remains accurate.

get.summary: Retrieve a book copy by identifier.
get.description: Returns the detailed information for the specified book copy, including the related book details, when the record exists.

get.summary: Retrieve book copies for a specific book.
get.description: Returns a paginated collection of book copies that belong to the specified book and supports filtering, searching, and sorting By [createdat,ownername,booktitle,updatedat]  for easier inventory review.

get.summary: Retrieve book copies owned by a specific student.
get.description: Returns a paginated collection of book copies owned by the specified student and supports filtering, searching, and sorting By [createdat,ownername,booktitle,updatedat]  for easier account review.

get.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of book copies.
get.description: Returns a paginated collection of all book copies and supports filtering, searching, and sorting so students can review available copies efficiently.

post.summary: Add a book copy to the lending list.
post.description: Creates a lending list record for the specified book copy owned by the student, making it available for borrowing for the given duration.
